app.name: AgentWeave
app.tagline: Ask naturally. The agent will handle the work.
appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose from the themes packaged by this App.
appearance.systemFont: Using the App's system font fallback.
language.title: Language
language.description: Choose from the languages packaged by this App.
settings.title: Settings
settings.ownerSkillsDescription: Manage authorized skill packages and revisions.
settings.developerToolsDescription: Manage local skill packages while the development API is enabled.
hostBootstrap.unavailable: Trusted App configuration is unavailable. Optional Host features remain closed.
foundation.description: Trusted host surfaces for connected services and durable personal context.
foundation.mailAccountsDescription: Connection state, provider identity, and scopes
foundation.pendingActionsDescription: Authoritative previews, approvals, and delivery state
foundation.memoryLedgerDescription: Inspect provenance, export, correct, or forget
foundation.accounts.title: Mail accounts
foundation.accounts.subtitle: Credentials never enter the renderer
foundation.accounts.emptyDescription: Enable a conforming Mail connector in the Agent App manifest.
foundation.accounts.hostChangeNotice: Connection changes are performed by the trusted host.
foundation.memory.title: Memory ledger
foundation.memory.subtitle: Inspectable, sourced, and forgettable
foundation.memory.emptyDescription: Proposals appear only after confirmation. Try a different query or ask the Agent to remember a preference.
foundation.memory.forgetDescription: The value and evidence will be scrubbed and removed from derived search. A non-sensitive tombstone remains for audit.
foundation.actions.title: Action desk
foundation.actions.subtitle: Authoritative previews and durable delivery state
foundation.actions.emptyDescription: Mail sends appear here only after an authoritative preview is persisted.
foundation.actions.terminalNote: This action is immutable and no longer accepts a decision.
model.title: Model connection
model.description: Configure the local OpenAI-compatible endpoint used by chat.
model.keyStored: API key stored with operating-system encryption
chat.reconnecting: Reconnecting to the local agent and resuming from saved progress…
chat.stopping: Stopping after the current safe boundary…
chat.cancelled: Generation stopped. Saved progress remains in this conversation.
chat.turnFailed: The agent turn failed. Saved progress is available in the conversation history.
chat.interrupted: The local agent restarted during this turn. Saved progress was recovered.
chat.sendError: Could not send message. Check your model or service connection.
chat.structuredActionFailed: This card action could not be completed. Refresh the conversation and try again.
chat.structuredActionRetry: The action failed. You can try again.
chat.starter: Hello! How can I help you today?
conversation.title: Conversations
conversation.loadError: This conversation could not be loaded. Retry from the history list.
conversation.listError: Conversation history is unavailable. Your current chat is unchanged.
conversation.conflictError: Conversation history changed elsewhere. The latest version has been loaded.
conversation.deleteDescription: Delete “{name}” and its local message history? This cannot be undone.
developer.title: Developer Tools
developer.apiUnavailableHint: Start the server with AGENTWEAVE_DEV_API=1 to manage local skills.
developer.actionFailed: Action failed. Keep the current inventory and try again.
developer.noPackagesHint: Adjust the search or create a new package.
developer.packageDetailsHint: Select a package to inspect prompts, diagnostics, and exported tools.
developer.noRuntimeToolsHint: This package currently provides instruction assets only.
developer.deleteWarning: Deleting this package removes local developer assets for {name}.
developer.deleteQuestion: Delete {name} and remove its local development assets?
developer.authoring.createSubtitle: Describe what the skill should do. The agent handles the package details.
developer.authoring.modelRequired: Connect a model to start creating
developer.authoring.modelRequiredHint: Skill Creator uses your saved LLM API settings for the authoring conversation. Your API key stays in the Host credential store.
developer.authoring.setupFailed: Skill Creator could not load the model or skill source. Close this window and try again.
developer.authoring.guideTitle: From an idea to a valid skill
developer.authoring.guideHint: Speak naturally. Skill Creator decides the name, trigger description, instructions, and package metadata with you.
developer.authoring.welcomeCreate: What should this skill help the agent do? A real example of what someone would ask is the best place to start.
developer.authoring.welcomeEdit: What would you like to change about {name}? Describe the behavior you want, and I’ll inspect the current skill with you.
developer.authoring.draftPrepared: I’ve prepared a skill draft for you to review and apply.
developer.authoring.sendFailed: Skill Creator could not complete that turn. Check the model connection and try again.
developer.authoring.draftDirectory: The proposed draft changed the existing package folder. Ask Skill Creator to revise it without renaming the package.
developer.authoring.draftFormat: The proposed draft was incomplete. Ask Skill Creator to prepare the skill draft again.
developer.authoring.conflict: This skill changed on disk. Close Skill Creator, refresh the inventory, and apply your change again.
developer.authoring.applyFailed: The draft could not be applied. Continue the conversation to revise it, or refresh the skill inventory and try again.
developer.authoring.completeHint: The Host validated the package and reloaded the active skill snapshot.
developer.authoring.completeReloadFailed: The package was saved, but the active snapshot could not be reloaded. Close this window and use Reload diagnostics.
developer.authoring.createPlaceholder: For example: Help me turn rough meeting notes into a concise decision log…
developer.authoring.composerHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line
developer.build.title: Build this App
developer.build.description: Review the selected App and package readiness before creating the macOS bundle.
developer.build.readyHint: {count} Skill package(s) passed the current readiness checks.
developer.build.commandHint: Run this command from the repository root after finishing your chat test.
android.settings.appearanceDescription: Theme choices are provided by this Agent App package.
android.settings.secretReferenceHint: Rust receives non-secret configuration and a secret reference.
android.chat.attachmentsUnavailable: Attachments are unavailable in the Android MVP
